name: J2EE Misconfiguration: Weak Access Permissions for EJB Methods
description: EJB methods in a J2EE application are configured with overly permissive access controls such as the ANYONE role, allowing unauthorized users to invoke sensitive operations that should be restricted to specific roles.
detection_pattern: META[ejb_jar_config] node contains method-permission elements granting the ANYONE role access to EXTERNAL[ejb_method] nodes performing privileged operations, without a CONTROL[role_restriction] node limiting invocation to authorized roles only
